name: pna
description: primary node address: network parameter FLOW-BUS

name: sna
description: secundary node address: network parameter FLOW-BUS

name: nna
description: next node address: network parameter FLOW-BUS

name: lna
description: last node address: network parameter FLOW-BUS

name: arbitrage
description: FLOW-BUS arbitrage setting and/or automatic optimization
value_options: 1: temporary busmaster | 2: always busmaster | 3: automatic busmaster | 67: auto busmaster and auto bus optimalization (fast token ring) | 83: auto busmaster and auto bus optimalization with fail safe

name: initreset
description: init and reset security key commands for network/parameter settings

name: setpslope
description: setpoint ramp signal 0..100 % in up to slope x 0.1 sec.

name: analoginp
description: analog input signal, normally used for ext. setp. (100% = 32000)

name: cntrlmode
description: control mode selection for instrument or module
value_options: 0: setpoint = BUS setpoint | 1: setpoint = analog input | 2: setpoint =  master output(FLOW-BUS) * slave factor(FLOW-BUS) | 3: close valve | 4: controller idle (no reaction on changes in sensor signal) | 5: testmode enable (select subject with par 70) | 6: tuningmode enable (select subtject with par 79) | 7: setpoint = 100% | 8: purge valve (fully open) | 9: calibration mode enable (select subject with par 58) | 10: setpoint = master output(analog in) * slave factor(FLOW-BUS) | 11: setpoint = keyboard OR FLOW-BUS setpoint | 12: setpoint  = 0% | 13: setpoint = master output(FLOW-BUS) * slave factor(analog in) | 14: (FPP) Range select mode | 15: (FPP) Manual start sensor select, automatic end sensor | 16: (FPP) Automatic start sensor select, manual end sensor | 17: (FPP) Automatic start and end sensor | 18: setpoint = RS232 setpoint | 19: RS232 broadcast mode | 20: valve stearing (valve = setpoint) | 21: analog valve stearing (valve = analog setpoint) | 22: valve safe state | 23: Use fluidset conditions for conversion (instead of p354) | 24: vent DEPx (when available)

name: polycnst E
description: polynomial constant E (offset) for setpoint or power value

name: polycnst F
description: polynomial constant F (span) for setpoint or power value

name: polycnst G
description: polynomial constant G for setpoint or power value

name: polycnst H
description: polynomial constant H for setpoint or power value

name: capacity
description: readout value at 100% in capacity (readout) unit

name: sensortype
description: sensor type information for actual reading and sensor/controller indication
value_options: 0: pressure (controller) | 1: liquid volume (controller) | 2: liquid/gas mass (controller) | 3: gas volume (controller) | 4: other sensor type (controller) | 5: temperature (controller) | 6: time (duration) (controller) | 7: frequency (controller) | 8: weight (controller) | 9: solutions (controller | 10: density (controller) | 128: pressure (sensor) | 129: liquid volume (sensor) | 130: liquid/gas mass (sensor) | 131: gas volume (sensor) | 132: other sensor type (sensor) | 133: temperature (sensor) | 134: time (durarion) (sensor) | 135: frequency (sensor) | 136: weight (sensor) | 137: solutions (sensor) | 138: density (sensor)

name: capunit
description: pointer to capacity (readout) unit (classic unit table]

name: fluidnr
description: fluid number: pointer to fluidset (for e.g. polynome, name and cap.)

name: claimnode
description: node address of module with operation rights

name: modify
description: contains number(s) of changed par (0xXX par nr, 0xFF more than one par changed)

name: alarminfo
description: status information of several alarms/errors in the instrument
value_options: 0: no error message in alarm error status register | 0: no warning message in alarm warning status register | 0: no minimum alarm message (measure>minimum limit) | 0: no maximum alarm message (measure<maximum limit) | 0: batch counter has not reached its limit | 0: response O.K. (setpoint-measure within limit) | 0: master output signal O.K. (or not used) | 0: hardware O.K. | 1: at least 1 error message in alarm error status register | 1: at least 1 warning message in alarm warning status register | 1: minimum alarm message for measured signal | 1: maximum alarm message for measured signal | 1: batch counter has reached its limit | 1: response alarm message: setpoint-measure is too high | 1: master output signal not received: check master instrument | 1: hardware error message: check your hardware

name: chanamount
description: amount of channels which can be operated

name: firstchan
description: first channel that can be operated

name: lastchan
description: last channel that can be operated

name: hostcontrl
description: operation by HOST computer enable flag

name: alrmmsgTA
description: alarm message string with unit type information

name: alrmmsgnr
description: alarm message string with unit number information

name: relstatus
description: status of relays/potential free contacts ('0' = not activated, '1' = activated)

name: signinpsel
description: signal input selection (' '=no value,'+'=pos value,'-'=neg value input)

name: limit
description: limit/batch for counter in sensor standard units

name: opermodeTA
value_options: 0: OFF | 1: A: MAX & RESP AUTO; T: UP TO LIMIT | 2: A: MIN & RESP AUTO; T: UP AND REPEAT | 3: A: MAX & RESP; T: DOWN FROM LIMIT | 4: A: MIN & RESP; T: DOWN AND REPEAT | 5: A: MAXIMUM ALARM; T: ALWAYS UP | 6: A: MINIMUM ALARM | 7: A: RESPONSE ALARM

name: readfact
description: readout factor matching readout unit string

name: TdValveDn
description: valve output differentiation time constant downwards

name: TdValveUp
description: valve output differentiation time constant upwards

name: TdSensorDn
description: sensor signal differentiation time constant downwards

name: TdSensorUp
description: sensor signal differentiation time constant upwards

name: CycleTime
description: cycle time * 10 msec. main loop signal processing

name: AnalogMode
description: analog mode selection for analog operation
value_options: 0: 0...5 Vdc operation | 0: Analog input enabled | 0: Analog output enabled | 1: 0...10 Vdc operation | 1: Analog input disabled | 1: Analog output disabled | 2: 0...20 mA operation | 3: 4...20 mA operation | 4: 15...20 mA operation

name: VrefOutput
description: reference voltage output signal for analog operation

name: ValveOut
description: valve output signal (24-bit number in range 0..14.3Vdc/0..23.3Vdc)

name: DynDispFct
description: dynamic display factor for display filter (0=max, 1=min goes with par 57)

name: StaDispFct
description: static display factor for display filter (0=max, 1=min goes with par 56)

name: CalMode
description: calibration mode selection (not active until cntrlmode has been set to value 9)
value_options: 0: idle: no action | 1: adc self calibration | 2: dmfc | 3: dmfc | 4: dmfc | 5: dmfc | 6: dmfc | 7: dmfc | 8: dmfc | 9: customer zero | 10: adjust Vref output by connecting it to analog in | 11: adjust analog out by connecting it to analog in | 12: adjust valveoutput by connecting it to analog in | 13: dmfc | 14: dmfc | 15: analog output = 0 % | 16: analog output = 100 % | 17: analog output = 50 % | 18: factory zero | 19: sensor differentiator (setpoint steps are needed!) | 20: automatic sensor configuration | 21: sensor temperature calibration | 22: customer zero (no control mode 9 needed) | 255: Error mode (result of previous cal mode)

name: ValveOffst
description: valve offset: amount of DAC steps within 1 potmeter step

name: Monitor
description: monitor: output signal (measure)  selection for bus and analog output
value_options: 0: (filtered) setpoint | 1: controller error input signal / raw sensor signal | 2: controller output signal to valve | 3: sensor signal slow | 4: sensor signal slow filtered | 5: linearization output | 6: differentiator output | 7: differentiator output filtered | 8: normal sensor signal (Output) | 9: analog input signal | 10: power supply voltage | 11: mass flow in display unit (normally ln/min) | 12: volume flow in l/min | 13: temperature in �C | 14: pressure absolute in mbara | 15: time in msec/frequency in Hz. | 16: calibrated volume at actual sensor in ml | 17: delta-P pressure in mbarg | 18: atmospheric (barometer) pressure in mbara | 19: mass flow in kg/min

name: AlarmReg1
value_options: 0: No diagnostics available in warning register | 1: Diagnostics available in warning register

name: AlarmReg2
description: alarm register containing critical error flags
value_options: 0: No diagnostics available in error register | 1: Diagnostics available in error register

name: CalRegZS1
description: calibration register zero scale input 1 ADC

name: CalRegFS1
description: calibration register full scale input 1 ADC

name: CalRegZS2
description: calibration register zero scale input 2 ADC

name: CalRegFS2
description: calibration register full scale input 2 ADC

name: ADCcntrReg
value_options: 0: ADC gain = 1x | 0: ADC bipolar mode | 0: Disable zero measure threshold | 1: ADC gain = 2x | 1: ADC unipolar mode | 1: Enable zero measure threshold | 2: ADC gain = 4x | 3: ADC gain = 8x | 4: ADC gain = 16x | 5: ADC gain = 32x | 6: ADC gain = 64x | 7: ADC gain = 128x

name: AlarmEnble
value_options: 0: disable | 1: enable

name: TestMode
description: test mode selection  (not active until cntrlmode has been set to value 5)
value_options: 0: idle; no action | 1: uProcessor | 2: IO | 3: RAM | 4: FRAM | 5: ADC | 6: DAC | 7: sensor | 8: valve drive circuit | 9: Vref | 10: FLOW-BUS | 11: calibration | 12: keyboard

name: ChanSelect
value_options: 1: AD channel 1 | 2: AD channel 2

name: AnOutCorZS
description: analog output correction factor zero scale (meas outp DSCM-A 0=0 other 32767=0)

name: AnOutCorFS
description: analog output correction factor full scale (meas outp 2000 = 1 * multiplication)

name: AnInpCorZS
description: analog input correction factor zero scale (ext setp DSCM-A 0=0 other 32767=0)

name: AnInpCorFS
description: analog input correction factor full scale (ext setp 2000 = 1 * multiplication)

name: TuningMode
description: (auto)tuning mode selection (not active until cntrlmode has been set to value 6)
value_options: 0: idle; no action | 1: sensor | 2: valve | 3: Fuzzy controller normal operation | 4: Fuzzy controller open at zero | 5: PID controller

name: DefVlvType
value_options: 0: normally closed | 1: normally opened | 2: normally closed inverse controlled | 3: normally opened inverse controlled | 4: remain position

name: GlobModify
description: contains number(s) of changed processes for indirect polling (0xXX / 0xFF)

name: SpanCorr
description: correction factor valve curve ratio high/low area

name: VlvCrvStps
description: Valve curve correction for controller (max. factor*0.1, flow where factor = 1)

name: MemShipNor
description: array with memberships for normal Fuzzy controller

name: MemShipOpn
description: array with memberships for 0-open Fuzzy controller

name: IOStatus
description: IO status byte for jumper settings and LED signal modes
value_options: 1: read diagnostic jumper (no diagnostics, read/write) | 1: not used | 1: read micro switch (read/write) | 1: diagnostic jumper set (read only) | 1: initialization jumper set (read only) | 1: analog jumper set (read only) | 1: micro switch pressed (read only) | 1: read analog jumper (use cntrlmode, read/write)

name: BHT1
description: special BHT parameter (to be changed by BHT only)

name: BHT10
description: special BHT parameter (to be changed by BHT only)

name: PulseHight
description: broadcast repeating time (x5 ms) (old:height of open at 0 pulse train for valve)

name: PressSensr
value_options: 0: delta-P 0..5" W.C. | 1: delta-P 0...10" W.C. | 2: absolute pressure 800-1200 mbar | 3: absolute pressure 800-1100 mbar | 4: delta-P -5...0 "W.C. | 5: delta-P -10...0 "W.C. | 6: delta-P -10...+10 "W.C. | 7: delta-P 0...1 PSI | 8: delta-P -1...0 PSI | 9: absolute pressure 0-10 bar

name: AnIn1CorZS
description: analog sensor signal input corr. factor zero scale (DSCM-A 0=0 other 32767=0)

name: AnIn1CorFS
description: analog sensor signal input correction factor full scale (2000=1*multiplication)

name: AnIn2CorZS
description: analog Vref input correction factor zero scale (DSCM-A 0=0 other 32767=0)

name: AnIn2CorFS
description: analog Vref input correction factor full scale (2000=1*multiplication)

name: AnOu1CorZS
description: analog setpoint output correction factor zero scale (DSCM-A 0=0 other 32767=0)

name: AnOu1CorFS
description: analog setpoint output correction factor full scale (2000=1*multiplication)

name: Reset
value_options: 0: no reset | 1: reset counter value (no mode change) or common reset | 2: reset alarm | 3: restart batch counter | 4: reset counter value (counter off) | 5: Reset module (soft reset)

name: AlrmMaxLim
description: maximum limit for sensor signal to trigger alarm situation

name: AlrmMinLim
description: minimum limit for sensor signal to trigger alarm situation

name: AlrmMode
value_options: 0: off | 1: alarm on absolute limits | 2: alarm on limits related to setpoint (response alarm) | 3: alarm when instrument powers-up (eg. after power-down)

name: AlrmOutMod
description: alarm relais activity mode during alarm situation
value_options: 0: no relais activity at alarm | 1: relais pulses until reset | 2: relais activated until reset

name: AlrmStpMod
description: setpoint change enable during alarm situation
value_options: 0: no setpoint change at alarm | 1: new/safe setpoint at alarm enabled (set at par 121)

name: AlrmNwSetp
description: new/safe setpoint during alarm situation (until reset)

name: CntrUnit
description: pointer to counter unit (classic counter unit table)

name: CntrOutMod
description: counter relais activity mode when limit/batch has been reached
value_options: 0: no relais activity at batch limit | 1: relais pulses after reaching batch limit until reset | 2: relais activated after reaching batch limit until reset

name: CntrStpMod
description: setpoint change enable during counter limit/batch situation (until reset)
value_options: 0: setpoint change at batch limit disabled | 1: setpoint change at batch limit enabled

name: CntrNwSetp
description: new/safe setpoint at counter limit/batch situation (until reset) (normally = 0%)

name: CntrUntstr
description: counter readout unit (informative only for older devices)

name: capunitstr
description: capacity readout unit (informative only for older devices)

name: CntrMode
value_options: 0: off | 1: counting upwards continuously | 2: counting up to limit (batchcounter)

name: HwRev
description: minimum required hardware revision level for firmware version

name: RCreadfact
description: readout factor for direct reading (changes with readunit: local on module, R.O.)

name: inputnode
description: physical node address for channel number

name: RCreadunit
description: readout unit for direct reading (local variable on module: read only)

name: SlaveFact%
description: slave factor for master slave control (setp = master output * slave factor)

name: VrefInput
description: reference voltage input for setpoint signal

name: RespStable
description: controller response when controller is stable: |measure-setpoint| < 2%

name: pressure
description: absolute pressure in mbar (FPP, FRM, FTM) or bar

name: sensornr
description: pointer to sensor number in calibration tube (FPP)

name: rangeselct
description: Piston Prover operation mode (write) and status information (read back)
value_options: 0: calibration ready/stop | 1: run calibration until stopsensor 1/select range 1 | 2: run calibration until stopsensor 2/select range 2 | 3: run calibration until stopsensor 3/select range 3 | 4: run calibration until stopsensor 4/select range 4 | 5: run calibration and select range 5 | 9: run calibration with automatic range selection | 19: run until stopsensor 1 until 3 values between limit | 29: run until stopsensor 2 until 3 values between limit | 39: run until stopsensor 3 until 3 values between limit | 49: run until stopsensor 4 until 3 values between limit | 59: run and select range 5 until 3 values between limit | 99: run with auto-select + 3 values between limit

name: TimeOut
description: maximum admitted duration time for specific procedure (in 100 ms)

name: imp/m3
description: For FRM and FTM imp/m3 and for FCM imp/kg

name: RefVolFlow
description: volume flow referenced to normal conditions i.e. 0 �C, 1013.25 hPa(a) in ln/min

name: volumeflow
description: volume flow at actual conditions in l/min

name: delta-p
description: relative pressure between atmosphere and sensor position

name: scalefact
description: scaling factor (multiplication) for readout on display (for optimal resolution)

name: sensorname
description: label with information about stop sensor

name: RstAlarmEn
description: enable reset of alarm by: keyboard, external signal, FLOW-BUS, automatic
value_options: 0: no reset possible | 1: reset: keyboard | 2: reset: external | 3: reset: keyboard or external | 4: reset: FLOW-BUS | 5: reset: FLOW-BUS or keyboard | 6: reset: FLOW-BUS or external | 7: reset: FLOW-BUS or keyboard or external | 8: reset: automatic | 9: reset: automatic or keyboard | 10: reset: automatic or external | 11: reset: automatic or keyboard or external | 12: reset: automatic or FLOW-BUS | 13: reset: automatic or FLOW-BUS or keyboard | 14: reset: automatic or FLOW-BUS or external | 15: reset: automatic or FLOW-BUS or keyboard or external

name: RstCountEn
description: enable reset of counter by: keyboard, external signal, FLOW-BUS, automatic
value_options: 0: no reset possible | 1: reset: keyboard | 2: reset: external | 3: reset: keyboard or external | 4: reset: FLOW-BUS | 5: reset: FLOW-BUS or keyboard | 6: reset: FLOW-BUS or external | 7: reset: FLOW-BUS or keyboard or external | 8: reset: automatic | 9: reset: automatic or keyboard | 10: reset: automatic or external | 11: reset: automatic or keyboard or external | 12: reset: automatic or FLOW-BUS | 13: reset: automatic or FLOW-BUS or keyboard | 14: reset: automatic or FLOW-BUS or external | 15: reset: automatic or FLOW-BUS or keyboard or external

name: MasterNode
description: node number of master instrument output signal for a slave

name: MasterProc
description: process number of master instrument output signal for a slave

name: InstrNode
description: node number of instrument to be operated by another module (keyboard/display)

name: InstrProc
description: process number of instrument to be operated by another module (keyboard/display)

name: RangeMin
description: Mnimum value at 0% for special user readout unit

name: RangeMax
description: Maximum value at 100% for special user readout unit

name: Relay/TTL
description: Relay/TTL output setting (disabled when used by alarm or counter)

name: RespOpen0%
description: Controller response when valve opens from zero

name: ContrType
value_options: 0: valve in normal position after startup | 0: open from zero with PID output to valve | 0: fixed monitor output signal | 0: voltage drift compensation for valve output turned on | 0: auto slope disabled | 0: automatic correction for valve open turned on | 0: controller special mode (valve output steps) turned off | 0: valve overshoot protection turned off | 1: valve in safe position after startup | 1: open from zero with ramp output to valve | 1: monitor output changed at setpoint steps | 1: voltage drift compensation for valve output turned off | 1: auto slope enabled for pilot valves | 1: automatic correction for valve open turned off | 1: controller special mode (valve output steps) turned on | 1: valve overshoot protection turned on

name: Density
description: Density of selected fluid in kg/m3

name: CalCertNr
description: Number of calibration certificate (last basic calibration)

name: IdentNr
value_options: 0: UFO?: Unidentified FLOW-BUS Object | 1: RS232/FLOW-BUS interface | 2: PC(ISA) interface | 3: ADDA4 (4 channels) | 4: R/C-module, 32 channels | 5: T/A-module | 6: ADDA1: 1 channel ADDA converter module | 7: DMFC: digital mass flow controller | 8: DMFM: digital mass flow meter | 9: DEPC: digital electronic pressure controller | 10: DEPM: digital electronic pressure meter | 11: ACT: single actuator | 12: DLFC: digital liquid flow controller | 13: DLFM: digital liquid flow meter | 14: DSCM-A: digital single channel module for analog instruments | 15: DSCM-D: digital single channel module for digital instr. | 16: FRM: FLOW-BUS rotor meter (calibration-instrument) | 17: FTM: FLOW-BUS turbine meter (calibration-instrument) | 18: FPP: FLOW-BUS piston prover/tube (calibration-instrument) | 19: F/A-module: special version of T/A-module | 20: DSCM-E: evaporator controller module (single channel) | 21: DSCM-C: digital single channel module for calibrators | 22: DDCM-A: digital dual channel module for analog instruments | 23: DMCM-D: digital multi channel module for digital instruments | 24: Profibus-DP/FLOW-BUS interface module | 25: FLOW-BUS Coriolis Meter | 26: FBI: FLOW-BUS Balance Interface | 27: CORIFC: CoriFlow Controller | 28: CORIFM: CoriFlow Meter | 29: FICC: FLOW-BUS Interface Climate Control | 30: IFI: Instrument FLOW-BUS Interface | 31: KFI: Keithley FLOW-BUS Interface | 32: FSI: FLOW-BUS Switch Interface | 33: MSCI: Multi-Sensor/Confroller Interface | 34: APP-D: Active Piston Prover | 35: LFI: Leaktester FLOW-BUS Interface | 36: Digital Batch Flow Controller | 37: Digital PID Controller | 38: Bus Gateway | 39: DTC: digital temperature controller | 40: DTM: digital temperature meter | 41: DC: digital controller | 42: DM: digital meter

name: BHT11
description: special BHT parameter (to be changed by BHT only)

name: Pupstream
description: pressure inlet (upstream) of fluid in bara (for first fluidnr only)

name: Pdownstrm
description: pressure outlet (downstream) of fluid in bara (for first fluidnr only)

name: FluidTemp
description: temperature of fluid through instrument (for first fluidnr only)

name: AlrmDelay
description: time alarm and reset action will be delayed when alarm limit has been exceeded

name: capacity0%
description: capacity of instrument at zero 0% in sensor base units (mostly equal to zero)

name: NumOfChan
description: number of instrument channels available for this device

name: DeviceFunc
value_options: 0: Unknown | 1: Interface | 2: ADDA | 3: Operator | 4: Supervisor (totalizer/alarm) | 5: Controller | 6: Meter | 7: Special | 8: (Protocol) converter

name: ScanChan
description: Channel  number to scan with real time information (to be set once)

name: ScanPar
description: Parameter number to scan with real time information (to be set once)

name: ScanTime
description: Scan interval time in msec between two samples (to be set once)

name: ScanData
description: Scanned data with time label (can be readout event by event)

name: ValveOpen

name: MinProTime

name: LeakRate

name: ModeInfOpt

name: ModeInfDes

name: NrOfVanes
description: Number of vanes for use in a rotor meter

name: fMeasure
description: measured value for direct reading (in capunits, max.= capacity)

name: fSetpoint
description: setpoint: wanted value for direct reading (in capunits, max.= capacity)

name: Mstatus

name: Mwarning
value_options: 0: No diagnostics available in manufacturer warning register | 1: Diagnostics available in manufacturer warning register

name: Merror

name: DiagHist
description: Diagnostic history string (contains history of diag codes)

name: DiagMode

value_options: 0: Debug mode off | 1: Debug mode on

name: MStatEnabl

value_options: 0: set status bit (range 0�127) | 127: set status bit (range 0�127) | 254: clear all status bits | 255: set all status bits

name: SlopeSetp
description: Slope setpoint step. Setpoint step for the given slopetime

name: FilterLen
description: Number of samples for average filter

name: CapMin

name: NormMasFlw

name: LFSpanAdj

name: SensBridge

name: SensName

name: ValveSafe

name: CnUnit

name: Bus2Mode

name: Bus2Select

name: PIOParm
description: PIO parameter connected to i/o channel (=process number*256+parameter number)

name: PIOCfgSel

name: PIOAnSA

name: VoltTCor

name: Bus1Parity
value_options: 0: None | 1: Odd | 2: Even

name: Bus2Parity
value_options: 0: None | 1: Odd | 2: Even

name: PCBSerialI
value_options: 0: Main PCB serial number | 1: Sensor PCB serial number

name: FluidNrSrc
description: Index of source fluidset for conversion

name: ActFlPIdx
value_options: 0: Density | 1: Heat capacity | 2: Thermal conductivity | 3: Viscosity

name: MixFrcType
value_options: 0: Volume fractions | 1: Mass fractions | 2: Mole fractions

name: FlConCondS
description: Fluid conversion conditions (temperature and pressure) selection
value_options: 0: Temperature from fluidset temperature parameter (p181) | 0: Pressure from fluidset pressure inlet parameter (p178) | 1: Temperature from temperature sensor parameter (p142) | 2: Pressure from pressure sensor parameter (p143)

name: BusIntIdx
value_options: 0: Fieldbus interface (main interface, fieldbus1) | 1: Instrument interface (fieldbus2) | 2: Display interface | 3: Service interface | 4: HART interface

name: SelfStat
value_options: 1: Production test completed succesfully | 2: Service test completed | 4: Production test detection enabled | 8: Service test detection enabled

name: Bus1IP
description: IP address, when no address configured value is 0.0.0.0 (DHCP)

name: Bus1SubMas
description: Subnet mask for the IP address

name: DosType
value_options: 0: Continuous | 1: Ratio | 2: Batch

name: DosCtrType
value_options: 0: PID controlled | 1: On/off controlled

name: DosActType
value_options: 0: Pump/control valve | 1: On/off valve

name: DosStartTp
value_options: 0: External trigger [dosing type=batch] | 1: Time interval [dosing type=batch]

name: LookDp
description: Lookup table for linearisation delta p
